Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6000 "ZYBEX-06C0-6000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $06c0 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Zybex.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $06C0 which copies 256 bytes of data from $06E0 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400.
